case_title: CHETAN SONDHI ET AL VS. LAN SWEI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-07-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SWEI, LAN
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SONDHI, CHETAN LABON, MICHAEL SWEI, LAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SONDHI, CHETAN LABON, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWEI, LAN $2,688.49 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,778.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY SONDHI, CHETAN LABON, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SWEI, LAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SONDHI, CHETAN LABON, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SWEI, LAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHETAN SONDHI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL LABON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAN WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATES TO THE COURT THAT HER NAME IS LAN SWEI. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE CORRECTION OF DEFENDANTS NAME FROM LAN WONG TO LAN SWEI. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
